message:
feat: table theme expansion, bidi text support, test improvements

Table Theme (table_theme.rs):
- Expanded theme configuration options for table widgets
- Additional border styles and cell formatting options

BiDi Text (bidi.rs):
- Added bidirectional text support for proper RTL/LTR rendering
- Unicode Bidirectional Algorithm implementation

Demo Showcase Tests:
- i18n_e2e.rs: Internationalization E2E test improvements
- inspector_stress.rs: Inspector stress test enhancements

Widget Fixes:
- block.rs: Minor adjustment
- table.rs: Table rendering tweaks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
